title: Equal Opportunity Representatives and Officers
description: Monitor and evaluate compliance with equal opportunity laws, guidelines, and policies to ensure that employment practices and contracting arrangements give equal opportunity without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, age, or disability.

tasks.text: Investigate employment practices or alleged violations of laws to document and correct discriminatory factors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports related to investigations of equal opportunity complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview persons involved in equal opportunity complaints to verify case information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study equal opportunity complaints to clarify issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret civil rights laws and equal opportunity regulations for individuals or employers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with persons involved in equal opportunity complaints to arbitrate and settle disputes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop guidelines for nondiscriminatory employment practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor the implementation and impact of guidelines for nondiscriminatory employment practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate, monitor, or revise complaint procedures to ensure timely processing and review of complaints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide information, technical assistance, or training to supervisors, managers, or employees on topics such as employee supervision, hiring, grievance procedures, or staff development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct surveys and evaluate findings to determine if systematic discrimination exists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare reports of selection, survey, or other statistics and recommendations for corrective action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with job search committees or coordinators to explain the role of the equal opportunity coordinator, to provide resources for advertising, or to explain expectations for future contacts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Counsel newly hired members of minority or disadvantaged groups, informing them about details of civil rights laws.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review company contracts to determine actions required to meet governmental equal opportunity provisions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Verify that all job descriptions are submitted for review and approval and that descriptions meet regulatory standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Consult with community representatives to develop technical assistance agreements in accordance with governmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the recruitment of employees through job fairs, career days, or advertising plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
